blocks.content: Eli caught up with him at the bike rack after school.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I don't know what you're talking about.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: He was trying to talk to you. Like a normal person. And you shut him down.
Kit said nothing. He unlocked his bike.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: You've had feelings for Daisy since we were twelve. Probably before that.
The air went quiet. A car passed on the street. Kit kept his eyes on the bike lock.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Don't do that. Not with me.
Kit let go of the lock. Didn't look at him.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I'm not telling you what to do. I'm telling you that taking it out on Ryan isn't going to fix anything. All it does is make it weird for her. And you don't want that.
He got on his bike and went. Didn't look back.
Kit stood at the rack. Eli was right. He knew it.
